channel.title: TN on Detention Pipeline
channel.description: Recent content in TN on Detention Pipeline

item.title: 287(g) JEM: Bradley County Sheriff’s Office (TN)
item.description:
287(g) agreement between ICE and Bradley County Sheriff’s Office.

Model: JEM Signed: December 9, 2025 County: Bradley County State: TN FIPS: 47011

Source: Prison Policy Initiative appendix table, compiled from ICE data as of Feb 17, 2026.
